title: M.Sc Food Science And Technology
content: M.Sc Food Science And Technology Department of Food Technology Programme Level Post Graduate Duration 2 Years Eligibility Fee Structure About the Programme Eligibility Bachelor Degree in Basic Health or Allied Science with minimum 50% marks or equivalent Students with a CUET score will be given preference in the merit list.
